rows.label: qev050303_MSG0001
rows.name:
...What is it? Are you perhaps the
one who answered the comms earlier?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0002
rows.name:
I told you to go home, didn't I? This is
a battlefield for us Larsians. It has
nothing to do with Earthlings like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and agree that it indeed has nothing to do with you.

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0021
rows.name: Explain that since you came to help, you are not unrelated.

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0003
rows.name:
I like people who know when to
back down. Now then... Please go
tell that girl that I am dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0004
rows.name:
She will probably be very
heartbroken... So if you don't
mind, please comfort her for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0005
rows.name:
Haha, many Larsians are rather
unrefined, so we're not very
good at that sort of thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmph... You're a meddler,
just like Vi Sezha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm begging you, go home. Neither
you nor she understands... the
resolve I carried to come here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0008
rows.name:
I threw away my bracelet just
to forget everything! Why are
you chasing after me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0009
rows.name:
Wha...!? This is...! The proof
of my bond with that girl...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah... Aaaaahhh!! Why would
you do such a thing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0011
rows.name:
I am about to risk my life to show
them the pride of the Lars... Why did
you have to bring this thing here?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0012
rows.name:
I am becoming a demon of carnage! If I
retain a human heart, I won't be able to
put even a single scratch on the Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm begging you, don't follow me anymore!
I am going to show the pride of the Lars
to those bastards who ruined everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0014
rows.name:
Good grief... That was incredible fighting.
As expected of an Earthling who can hold
their own against us Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Thank you. Now it seems I
will be able to properly keep
my promise to Vi Sezha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what promise she means.

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0040
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0041
rows.name: Emphatically verify that she won't do anything reckless again.

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0016
rows.name:
When I became a warrior and she became a jeweler,
and the two of us were about to walk separate
paths, she gave me these matching bracelets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0017
rows.name:
"Let us share this life together"...
So that no matter what happened,
we would never be separated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0018
rows.name:
Cute thing to do, wasn't it? If
I were a man, I would have hugged
her and proposed on the spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Well, and so I made a promise. That no matter
what kind of bad guys came along, as long as Vi
Sezha was alive, I would always protect her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ah... If I were to die... I would
become an incredibly huge liar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0021
rows.name:
I promised that girl I would continue
to protect her as long as I lived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0022
rows.name:
Even if it goes against the path of the warrior...
For Vi Sezha's sake, I have no choice but to push
forward, even if I make an enemy of the whole world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0023
rows.name:
It was quite a long time ago, and so much has
happened since the Growth appeared that I had
completely forgotten about it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0024
rows.name:
When you handed me this bracelet, it
all came back to me, clear as day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0025
rows.name:
...It's pathetic, but... I
am going back to Vi Sezha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0036
rows.name:
When I see her face, crying tears of joy,
the pride I was so hung up on until now just
floats away, making my chest feel light.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0037
rows.name:
Maybe I... was so bound by vengeance
and pride that I lost sight of
what was truly important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Excuse me... It's Vi
Sezha. Is this [ST:playername ]-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm sorry, I just had a bad feeling,
so I decided to contact you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0029
rows.name: ...So, how did it go? Did you find her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0050
rows.name: Tell Truth

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0051
rows.name: Say that Ge Jewhe lost her life while standing frozen.

rows.label: qev050303_JNK0060
rows.name: Silence

rows.label: qev050303_SEL0061
rows.name: Fall silent out of consideration for Vi Sezha's feelings.

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0030
rows.name:
She passed away while still facing
the enemy...? That can't be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Something terrible happened, didn't
it? There's no need to spare my
feelings. I have prepared myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0032
rows.name:
Eh... She passed away while still
facing the enemy...? That can't be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0033
rows.name:
Huh... My body feels so weak...
Even though I thought I was
emotionally prepared for this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0034
rows.name:
My mind has gone completely blank...
At any rate, then, her dagger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050303_MSG0035
rows.name: Ah...[ST:wait ]
